query: SELECT u.name, u.id, c.id as cycle_id, c.status, c.dueDate, c.submissionId FROM check_in_cycles c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.clientId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' ORDER BY c.dueDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT u.name, u.id, c.id as cycle_id, c.status, c.dueDate, c.submissionId FROM check_in_cycles c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.clientId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' ORDER BY c.dueDate DESC LIMIT 5;
